nasb.text: that all the people returned to the camp to Joshua at Makkedah in peace. No one uttered a word against any of the sons of Israel.

esv.text: then all the people returned safe to Joshua in the camp at Makkedah. Not a man moved his tongue against any of the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 眾以色列人都平平安安回到瑪基大營中約書亞那裡。沒有人敢說話攻擊以色列人。

ccb.text: 以色列人都安然无恙地回到约书亚驻扎的玛基大营。再也没有人敢威胁以色列人了。
